name: Welcome teacher
short_description: This is a horror RPG Maker MV game. Explore the quiet countryside shrouded in darkness, and uncover the hidden secret of terror that lies behind it.
detailed_description:
[To set the game language]

Go to the 'Options', click on the 'Language', and you can play the game in English

[Game Introduction]

Newly hired teacher Nanuri is assigned to a peaceful school in a serene countryside. However, the place conceals a chilling secret. Every night, mysterious creatures emerge, and it seems the villagers are hiding something. Nanuri must confront this enigmatic threat by uncovering clues, tracing the steps of both the monsters and the villagers, and ultimately revealing a horrifying truth.
